id.description: A UUID string identifying this hog flow.

rrule.description: iCalendar RRULE string (e.g. 'FREQ=DAILY;INTERVAL=1'). Must produce occurrences at most once per hour.

starts_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime the schedule starts from.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for interpreting the RRULE (default 'UTC').

variables.description: Variable value overrides merged with the workflow defaults on each run.
